ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the country (e.g., developing, developed) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Current population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "governance_type" TEXT /* Type of governance (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy of the population */,
  "adult_mortality" INTEGER /* Adult mortality rate */,
  "infant_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of infant deaths */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol consumption per capita */,
  "hepatitis_b" INTEGER /* Hepatitis B prevalence */,
  "measles" INTEGER /* Measles cases */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Average BMI of the population */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "population" REAL /* Population of the country */,
  "thinness_1_19_years" REAL /* Percentage of thinness among children aged 1-19 years */,
  "thinness_5_9_years" REAL /* Percentage of thinness among children aged 5-9 years */,
  "income_composition" REAL /* Income composition of resources */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease outbreak */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the outbreak occurred */,
  "polio" INTEGER /* Number of polio cases */,
  "diphtheria" INTEGER /* Number of diphtheria cases */,
  "hiv_aids" REAL /* HIV/AIDS prevalence */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated against the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diseases_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_expenditure" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare expenditure */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "total_expenditure" REAL /* Total healthcare expenditure */,
  "percentage_expenditure" REAL /* Percentage of GDP spent on healthcare */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "public_expenditure" REAL /* Public expenditure on healthcare */,
  "private_expenditure" REAL /* Private expenditure on healthcare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_expenditure_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "schooling" REAL /* Average years of schooling */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
